name: zk-circuit
description: 成绩披露用 Circom 电路：Poseidon Merkle + 成绩区间，配合 snarkjs trusted setup

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/circuit.r1cs pot14_final.ptau circuit_final.zkey && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuit_final.zkey verification_key.json
scripts.export: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier circuit_final.zkey verifier.sol
